content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Reviewed the materialize_beads implementation in src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs, the CLI export-beads subcommand in src/cli/milestone.rs, and the br_process.rs working_dir accessor. All 5 new tests pass (materialize_beads_creates_epics_tasks_and_resolved_dependencies, _is_idempotent_for_existing_titles, _ignores_other_milestones_with_same_titles, _resolves_implicit_dependency_ids, and record_beads_exported_event_appends_bundle_hash_and_ids, plus _returns_error_without_sync_when_mutation_fails). cargo clippy -- -D warnings is clean; cargo fmt --check is clean. The single failing test (resume_running_failed_project_reenters_failure_reconciliation) is a pre-existing flaky timestamp-regression test reproduced on master and unrelated to this change. Implementation satisfies all acceptance criteria: root + workstream epic hierarchy, task beads with labels/priority/description, dependency edges from BeadProposal.depends_on resolved via proposal-ID map, planning rationale comments, idempotency via label-scoped existing-bead lookup, and post-mutation sync via sync_own_dirty_if_beads_healthy. Minor observations not rising to fix-now: one dead-code branch in find_existing_materialized_bead (unreachable empty-matches check after remove returned Some), comments-on-reuse skipped (mild state gap on retry after a late-stage failure), ensure_synced preflight requires manual flush before retrying pending mutations, and duplicate-title beads across workstreams would collide on idempotent lookup. These are design trade-offs or edge cases, not correctness bugs.

## Amendments

None.
